votes.reason: WIL=1 being optimal is a clear design trap I identified; concrete benefit is mandatory.
I warned regen could dominate; three-way tradeoff is essential to avoid replacing one trap with another.
My Porcupine/Vulture designs explicitly create RPS matchups; this is the correct meta structure.
The Viper precedent is clear; refresh-only mechanics are the safe implementation pattern.
Porcupine's thorns directly counter melee meta; these archetypes are necessary for diversity.
Functional clones waste slots; my proposals demonstrated distinct identity is achievable.
I designed within frozen constraints; breaking them invalidates the entire balancing framework.
